content.query:
SELECT DISTINCT         CASE WHEN ODL.NEPR * ODL.IVQT < 0 THEN 'Credit' ELSE 'Sales' END AS [Invoice Type]
,                       IM.GRP3 as [Finance Brand]
,                       CASE WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM03153', 'COM03154', 'COM03155', 'COM03156') THEN 'RDP' ELSE OC.SDST END AS BuyingGroup
,                        OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,                       OC.ALCU AS [AdCraft Customer Number]
,                       OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,                       ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) AS [External Rep ID]
,                       CS.TX40 AS [External Rep Name]
,                       CASE WHEN /*CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'JGENZALE'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OC.RESP = 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'JGENZALE'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'JGENZALE'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'PMARMO'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OC.RESP IN ('INDUSTRIAL', 'INDUS DEAL') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'PMARMO'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'INDUSTRIAL' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'PMARMO'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'MMCASSEY' THEN 'MMCASSEY'
                       WHEN */OC.ALCU IN (
                            'A-A-6005','ABC-0502','ACT-9780','ACT-9781','ALA-9476','ALA-9477','ALL-6626','ALL-6627','ALP-7889','ALP-7890','AMU-5961','AMU-5962','B-J-6165','B-J-6166','BOX-1188',
                            'BUD-0425','BUD-0426','BUR-7377','B-W-0100','B-W-0101','CHA-0275','CHA-4400','CHA-4401','CHE-5537','CLA-1112','COO-9830','C-R-1818','CUL-1190','DAR-9150','DON-0101',
                            'DON-0102','DON-0103','DON-0104','DON-0105','DUB-4431','DUC-0601','FED-0135','FED-0136','FET-0900','FOO-3010','FOO-8009','FOO-8010','FOO-9915','FOO-9916','FOU-0500',
                            'F-R-7022','HAW-2292','HOS-4170','HOT-2113','HOU-0920','INS-0230','INS-0231','KES-0110','KES-0111','KES-1629','KES-1634','KRE-0110','KRE-0111','LAG-0600','LAG-8540',
                            'LOU-5012','MID-5755','MIS-0690','NEL-1110','NEL-2424','NEL-3456','NEW-0788','OLY-0636','OMC-0234','PEN-9800','PEN-9801','PEO-1944','PEO-1945','PIT-0634','PIT-0635',
                            'RAP-0001','RES-0505','RES-0601','RES-0619','RES-0621','RES-8733','RES-8734','ROC-0101','ROC-6950','SAR-0070','SEA-4900','STA-1395','STA-1396','STA-1397','SUP-5455',
                            'TRI-0775','TUN-4941','WAC-0600','WAC-0601','WAS-0301','WOR-5965','ZAB-0500','ZAB-0501'
                                        ) AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'SMW', 'WSS') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM02185', 'COM01934') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'SMW', 'WSS') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM03154', 'COM03155') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'WSS') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN (
                            'SER-0920','SER-0921','SPE-0155','SPE-0156','SUP-3622','SUP-3623','T-C-5454','T-C-5455','THO-1128','THO-1129','TRE-9420','TRE-9421','UNI-1602','UNI-1603','WES-6978',
                            'WES-9140','WES-9141','ZES-0400','ZES-0401'
                                        ) AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN ('WAS-0300') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'PLM') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM03153') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('PLM', 'ICE') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN (
                            'A-A-3535','A-A-3536','ACE-0450','ACE-0451','ASS-0043','ASS-0044','B-G-0391','BBC-8828','BBC-8829','BOL-0100','BOL-0101','BUL-0100','BUL-0101','CAR-7430','CAR-7431',
                            'CAS-3151','CAS-3152','CEN-0575','CEN-0576','CHE-5536','COM-2912','COM-2913','CRE-0145','CRE-0146','C-T-3374','C-T-3375','DEA-5587','DEA-5588','DEP-1900','DEP-1901',
                            'DIC-0526','DON-1872','E-A-9333','E-A-9334','FAS-7221','FAS-7222','FEL-0150','FEL-0151','FIN-0450','FIN-0451','FOO-3011','FOO-7211','FOO-7212','GER-0400','GER-0401',
                            'GLO-6611','GLO-6612','GOL-0155','GOL-0156','GRO-3505','GRO-3506','HOR-4674','HOR-4675','J-E-0751','JEA-0700','JOH-9103','JOH-9104','KIR-0100','KIR-0101','LAF-4534',
                            'LAF-4535','MAC-4540','MAC-4541','MAN-7088','MAN-7089','MAR-0135','PUE-8857','PUE-8858'
                                        ) AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN OC.ALCU = 'JEA-0701' AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'WSS') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN RR.Region = 'East' AND IM.GRP4 IN ('PLM', 'ICE') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        WHEN RR.Region IN ('MW', 'West') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'WSS') THEN 'JTAYLOR'
                        END AS [Employee]
,                       ODH.ORNO AS [Sales Order]
,                       OL.CUOR AS [Customer PO]
,                       IV.EXIN AS [Invoice Number]
,                       CAST(CAST(NULLIF(ODH.IVDT,0) AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DATE) AS [Invoice Date]
,                       IM.ITNO AS Item
,                       IM.ITDS AS [Item Name]
,                       IM.PRGP AS [Item Type]
,                       IM.ITCL AS Brand
,                       ODL.WHLO AS Warehouse
,                       IM.BUAR AS Division
,                       ODL.IVQT AS [Inv Qty]
,                       CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.NEPR END * ODL.IVQT AS [Inv Amt]
--,                       ODL.DCOS AS [Inv Cost]
--,                       ISNULL(CH.CRAM, 0) * (CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.NEPR END * ODL.IVQT) / NULLIF (SUM(CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.NEPR END * ODL.IVQT) OVER (PARTITION BY ODH.ORNO) * 1.00, 0) AS [Customer Freight]
--,                       ODH.ORTP as [Order Type]
--,                       OC.OREF as [IC Flag]
--,                       ODH.TEDL as [Freight Terms]
,                       CS2.TX40+' - '+SC.TX40 AS [Product Category and Line]
,                       IM.GRP4 as [Product Class]
--,                       CG.A330 AS [Sales Admin]
--,                       OC.RESP AS [Responsible]
,                       CASE/* WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00063
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OC.RESP = 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .01
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00125
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00063
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OC.RESP IN ('INDUSTRIAL', 'INDUS DEAL') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .005
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'INDUSTRIAL' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00125
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'MMCASSEY' THEN .01*/
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN (
                            'A-A-6005','ABC-0502','ACT-9780','ACT-9781','ALA-9476','ALA-9477','ALL-6626','ALL-6627','ALP-7889','ALP-7890','AMU-5961','AMU-5962','B-J-6165','B-J-6166','BOX-1188',
                            'BUD-0425','BUD-0426','BUR-7377','B-W-0100','B-W-0101','CHA-0275','CHA-4400','CHA-4401','CHE-5537','CLA-1112','COO-9830','C-R-1818','CUL-1190','DAR-9150','DON-0101',
                            'DON-0102','DON-0103','DON-0104','DON-0105','DUB-4431','DUC-0601','FED-0135','FED-0136','FET-0900','FOO-3010','FOO-8009','FOO-8010','FOO-9915','FOO-9916','FOU-0500',
                            'F-R-7022','HAW-2292','HOS-4170','HOT-2113','HOU-0920','INS-0230','INS-0231','KES-0110','KES-0111','KES-1629','KES-1634','KRE-0110','KRE-0111','LAG-0600','LAG-8540',
                            'LOU-5012','MID-5755','MIS-0690','NEL-1110','NEL-2424','NEL-3456','NEW-0788','OLY-0636','OMC-0234','PEN-9800','PEN-9801','PEO-1944','PEO-1945','PIT-0634','PIT-0635',
                            'RAP-0001','RES-0505','RES-0601','RES-0619','RES-0621','RES-8733','RES-8734','ROC-0101','ROC-6950','SAR-0070','SEA-4900','STA-1395','STA-1396','STA-1397','SUP-5455',
                            'TRI-0775','TUN-4941','WAC-0600','WAC-0601','WAS-0301','WOR-5965','ZAB-0500','ZAB-0501'
                                        ) AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'SMW', 'WSS') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM02185', 'COM01934') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'SMW', 'WSS') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM03154', 'COM03155') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'WSS') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN (
                            'SER-0920','SER-0921','SPE-0155','SPE-0156','SUP-3622','SUP-3623','T-C-5454','T-C-5455','THO-1128','THO-1129','TRE-9420','TRE-9421','UNI-1602','UNI-1603','WES-6978',
                            'WES-9140','WES-9141','ZES-0400','ZES-0401'
                                        ) AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN ('WAS-0300') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'PLM') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM03153') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('PLM', 'ICE') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.ALCU IN (
                            'A-A-3535','A-A-3536','ACE-0450','ACE-0451','ASS-0043','ASS-0044','B-G-0391','BBC-8828','BBC-8829','BOL-0100','BOL-0101','BUL-0100','BUL-0101','CAR-7430','CAR-7431',
                            'CAS-3151','CAS-3152','CEN-0575','CEN-0576','CHE-5536','COM-2912','COM-2913','CRE-0145','CRE-0146','C-T-3374','C-T-3375','DEA-5587','DEA-5588','DEP-1900','DEP-1901',
                            'DIC-0526','DON-1872','E-A-9333','E-A-9334','FAS-7221','FAS-7222','FEL-0150','FEL-0151','FIN-0450','FIN-0451','FOO-3011','FOO-7211','FOO-7212','GER-0400','GER-0401',
                            'GLO-6611','GLO-6612','GOL-0155','GOL-0156','GRO-3505','GRO-3506','HOR-4674','HOR-4675','J-E-0751','JEA-0700','JOH-9103','JOH-9104','KIR-0100','KIR-0101','LAF-4534',
                            'LAF-4535','MAC-4540','MAC-4541','MAN-7088','MAN-7089','MAR-0135','PUE-8857','PUE-8858'
                                        ) AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF') THEN .01
                        WHEN OC.ALCU = 'JEA-0701' AND IM.GRP4 IN ('ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'WSS') THEN .01
                        WHEN RR.Region = 'East' AND IM.GRP4 IN ('PLM', 'ICE') THEN .01
                        WHEN RR.Region IN ('MW', 'West') AND IM.GRP4 IN ('CKW', 'ELC', 'GAS', 'ICE', 'PLM', 'REF', 'WSS') THEN .01
                        ELSE 0
                        END AS [Employee Commission Rate] 
FROM                    M3.ODHEAD AS ODH 
LEFT JOIN               M3.ODLINE AS ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX 
LEFT JOIN               M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR
LEFT JOIN               M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
INNER JOIN              M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN               M3.OINVOH AS IV ON ODL.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND ODH.CUNO = IV.PYNO 
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSMCDX AS CX ON OC.CFC9 = CX.OBV1 AND CX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSMCDX AS CX2 ON OC.CFC9 = CX2.OBV1 AND IM.ITCL = CX2.OBV2 AND CX2.PREX = 4 
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = CS.STKY AND cs.STCO = 'SMCD' 
LEFT JOIN               M3.OOCHRG AS CH ON ODH.ORNO = CH.ORNO AND CH.CRID = 'FRE002' AND ODH.DLIX = CH.DLIX
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSYTAB AS CS2 ON IM.ITGR = CS2.STKY AND cs2.STCO = 'ITGR'
LEFT JOIN               M3.CUGEX1 AS CG ON OC.CUNO = CG.PK01 AND CG.[FILE] = 'OCUSMA'
LEFT JOIN               M3.CRPDLN SC ON IM.PDLN=SC.PDLN
LEFT JOIN               M3.RD_REGIONS RR ON RR.Store = LEFT(OL.CUOR, 3) and OC.CUNO = 'COM03156'
WHERE                    (ODH.IVNO <> '0')
AND                     CAST(CAST(NULLIF(ODH.IVDT,0) AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DATE) BETWEEN '20240601' AND '20240630'
AND                     IM.GRP3 = 'ADM'

UNION ALL

SELECT DISTINCT         CASE WHEN ODL.NEPR * ODL.IVQT < 0 THEN 'Credit' ELSE 'Sales' END AS [Invoice Type]
,                       IM.GRP3 as [Finance Brand]
,                       CASE WHEN OC.CUNO IN ('COM03153', 'COM03154', 'COM03155', 'COM03156') THEN 'RDP' ELSE OC.SDST END AS BuyingGroup
,                        OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,                       OC.ALCU AS [AdCraft Customer Number]
,                       OC.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,                       ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) AS [External Rep ID]
,                       CS.TX40 AS [External Rep Name]
,                       CASE WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'JGENZALE'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OC.RESP = 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'JGENZALE'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'JGENZALE'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'PMARMO'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OC.RESP IN ('INDUSTRIAL', 'INDUS DEAL') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'PMARMO'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'INDUSTRIAL' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN 'PMARMO'
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'MMCASSEY' THEN 'MMCASSEY'
                        END AS [Employee]
,                       ODH.ORNO AS [Sales Order]
,                       OL.CUOR AS [Customer PO]
,                       IV.EXIN AS [Invoice Number]
,                       CAST(CAST(NULLIF(ODH.IVDT,0) AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DATE) AS [Invoice Date]
,                       IM.ITNO AS Item
,                       IM.ITDS AS [Item Name]
,                       IM.PRGP AS [Item Type]
,                       IM.ITCL AS Brand
,                       ODL.WHLO AS Warehouse
,                       IM.BUAR AS Division
,                       ODL.IVQT AS [Inv Qty]
,                       CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.NEPR END * ODL.IVQT AS [Inv Amt]
--,                       ODL.DCOS AS [Inv Cost]
--,                       ISNULL(CH.CRAM, 0) * (CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.NEPR END * ODL.IVQT) / NULLIF (SUM(CASE WHEN ODL.POSX <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE ODL.NEPR END * ODL.IVQT) OVER (PARTITION BY ODH.ORNO) * 1.00, 0) AS [Customer Freight]
--,                       ODH.ORTP as [Order Type]
--,                       OC.OREF as [IC Flag]
--,                       ODH.TEDL as [Freight Terms]
,                       CS2.TX40+' - '+SC.TX40 AS [Product Category and Line]
,                       IM.GRP4 as [Product Class]
--,                       CG.A330 AS [Sales Admin]
,                       OC.RESP AS [Responsible]
,                       CASE WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00063
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OC.RESP = 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .01
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'JGENZALE' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'AMISH' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00125
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00063
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OC.RESP IN ('INDUSTRIAL', 'INDUS DEAL') AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .005
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'PMARMO' AND OL.whlo NOT IN ('DIW', 'DFF') AND OC.RESP <> 'INDUSTRIAL' AND IM.ITCL <> 'CUL' THEN .00125
                        WHEN CG.A330 = 'MMCASSEY' THEN .01 ELSE 0
                        END AS [Employee Commission Rate] 
FROM                    M3.ODHEAD AS ODH 
LEFT JOIN               M3.ODLINE AS ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX 
LEFT JOIN               M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR
LEFT JOIN               M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
INNER JOIN              M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN               M3.OINVOH AS IV ON ODL.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND ODH.CUNO = IV.PYNO 
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSMCDX AS CX ON OC.CFC9 = CX.OBV1 AND CX.PREX = 3 
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSMCDX AS CX2 ON OC.CFC9 = CX2.OBV1 AND IM.ITCL = CX2.OBV2 AND CX2.PREX = 4 
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON ISNULL(CX.SMD1, CX2.SMD1) = CS.STKY AND cs.STCO = 'SMCD' 
LEFT JOIN               M3.OOCHRG AS CH ON ODH.ORNO = CH.ORNO AND CH.CRID = 'FRE002' AND ODH.DLIX = CH.DLIX
LEFT JOIN               M3.CSYTAB AS CS2 ON IM.ITGR = CS2.STKY AND cs2.STCO = 'ITGR'
LEFT JOIN               M3.CUGEX1 AS CG ON OC.CUNO = CG.PK01 AND CG.[FILE] = 'OCUSMA'
LEFT JOIN               M3.CRPDLN SC ON IM.PDLN=SC.PDLN
LEFT JOIN               M3.RD_REGIONS RR ON RR.Store = LEFT(OL.CUOR, 3) and OC.CUNO = 'COM03156'
WHERE                    (ODH.IVNO <> '0')
AND                     CAST(CAST(NULLIF(ODH.IVDT,0) AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DATE) BETWEEN '20240601' AND '20240630'
AND                     IM.GRP3 = 'ADM'
